{{Missing Info|specifics=This page is being formatted by the wiki team. Thank you for your patience as we find the best page structure. Reach out to us on Discord to help!}}

==Arcane Moon==
{| class="wikitable"
!Pedestal
!colspan="2"|Task
!Rewards
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Front-Left
|Dig-Mine
|Dig out all 5 Mines on tiles: 9.2; 18.2; 27.2; 36.2; 43.2
|{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Front-Right
|Clear Domain
|Clear Lionbird; Crowfeet; PuffleHuff; Vyperin; Minerva Area
|{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Back-Left
|Eliminate Generals
|Eliminate Dean of Lionbird; Dean of Crowfeet; Dean of Pufflehuff; Dean of Vyperin
|{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Back-Right
|Explore Domain
|Investigate the tiles within the Lionbird; Crowfeet; Pufflehuff; Vyperin; Minerva Area
|{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +3
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Back-Middle
|Arcane God
|Defeat Minerva and Minerva's Head
|{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +5
|}

===Moon Shop===
{|class="wikitable"
!Item
!Cost in<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}}
!Quantity Available
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}}{{Retext|T3 Minerva Power|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}}{{Retext|T3 Minerva Wings|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}}{{Retext|T3 Minerva Core|blue}} +50
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +150k}}
|2||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Sunny Plant Food, +3|orange}}
|3||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +2d}}
|4||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe, +8|orange}}
|5||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
|6||1
|-
|After Domain is 100%<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Hellenic Nebula Pack|orange}} ({{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +2k}} and {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +2|orange}})
|7||1
|}

==Weasels' Shop (Tile 8)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Product
!Cost in {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}}
|1M
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Sunny Plant Food, +3|orange}}
|200k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Magic Potion, +80}}
|150k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|100k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Glue, +100}}
|80k
|}

==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Minion Battle
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|-
|Store
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|
|}

==Tiles==
{| class="wikitable"
!Tile
!Name
!Notes
!Rewards
|-
|rowspan="2"|1
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Director of Admissions
|
|{{RewardIcon|World Superstar}} [[Museum#Promotions|{{Retext|World Superstar Ad Flyer|orange}}]] +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Admission Ad
|Read Admission Intro and Qualifications
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}
|-
|2
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Lionbird Magic Guard
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}}T1 Minerva Power +10
|-
|3
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Lionbird Instructor
|
|{{RewardIcon| Minerva Wings}} T1 Minerva Wings +10
|-
|4
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Lionbird Instructor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} T1 Minerva Core, +10
|-
|rowspan="2"|5
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Lionbird Professor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}}T1 Minerva Power +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sealed Casket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}}: 3344
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|-
|6
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Lionbird Lecturer
|
|{{RewardIcon| Minerva Wings}} T1 Minerva Wings +10
|-
|7
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Lionbird Professor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} T1 Minerva Core, +10
|-
|rowspan="2"| 8
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Lionbird Power
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}}T1 Minerva Power +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|The Weasels
|Opens Weasels' shop
|
|-
|rowspan="2"|9
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Magic Puppet
|
|{{RewardIcon| Minerva Wings}} T1 Minerva Wings +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 1d 10h 20min; requirement: 70x T6 minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Hellenic Treasure Map, +1000}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest, +750}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithText|Holy Wood Core, +9}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|10
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Dean of Lionbird
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} T1 Minerva Core, +10
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Dean of Lionbird
|ATK: 132.300, DEF: 88.200, HP: 3.466.670, AFFCT: 125.700?; <br>Special stats: HIT: +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +10|orange}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|-
|11
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cowfeet Magic Guard
|
|{{RewardIcon|T1 Minerva Power}} T1 Minerva Power +10
|-
|12
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Crowfeet Instructor
|
|{{RewardIcon| Minerva Wings}} T1 Minerva Wings +10
|-
|13
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Crowfeet Instructor
|
|{{RewardIcon| Minerva Core}} T1 Minerva Core +10
|-
|rowspan="2"|14
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Crowfeet Lecturer
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Power, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Sealed Portal
|Display Awakened Relic: Soul Stone
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Dark Lord's Diary|green}}
|-
|15
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Crowfeet Lecturer
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Wings, +8|green}}
|-
|16
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Crowfeet Professor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Core, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|17
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Crowfeet Professor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Power, +8|green}}
|-
| style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Librarion of Magic
|Quiz answers: C A C A C
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +500}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}}: 3344<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|18
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Magic Puppet
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Wings, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 1d 10h 20min; requirement: 70x T6 minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Hellenic Treasure Map, +1000}},<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +2,<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Holy Wood Core, +9}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|19
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Dean of Crowfeet
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Core, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Dean of Crowfeet
|ATK: 134,400, DEF: 89.600, HP: 3523854, AFFCT: 130.100?<br>Special stats: HIT+50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +10|orange}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|-
|20
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pufflehuff Magic Guard
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Power, +8|green}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|21
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pufflehuff Instructor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Wings, +8|green}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Magic Guard
|Display Relic: {{RewardIconWithLink|Flying Broom|green}}
|Opens Broom Zoom
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Broom Zoom
|Complete 7 challenges
|Total:<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Hellenic Treasure Map, +400}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Forbidden Magic List|green}}
|-
|22
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pufflehuff Instructor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Core, +8|green}}
|-
|23
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pufflehuff Lecturer
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Power, +8|green}}
|-
|24
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pufflehuff Lecturer
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Wings, +8|green}}
|-
|25
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pufflehuff Professor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T2 Minerva Core, +8|green}}
|-
|26
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Pufflehuff Professor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Power, +8|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|27
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Magic Puppet
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Wings, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 1d 12h 40min; requirement: 70x T6 minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Hellenic Treasure Map, +1000}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +2|orange}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithText|Holy Wood Core, +9}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|28
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Dean of Pufflehuff
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Dean of Pufflehuff
|ATK:136.500, DEF: 91.000, HP3.581.087, AFFCT: 134.600<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +10|orange}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|-
|29
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Vyperin Magic Guard
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Power, +8|blue}}
|-
|30
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Vyperin Instructor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Wings, +8|blue}}
|-
|31
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Vyperin Instructor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|32
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Vyperin Lecturer
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Power, +8|blue}}
|-
|33
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Vyperin Lecturer
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Wings, +8|blue}}
|-
|34
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Vyperin Professor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|rowspan="3"|35
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Vyperin Professor
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Power, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Chamber
|Display Relic: {{RewardIconWithLink|Dark Lord's Diary|green}}
|Unlocks Chamber Snake
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Chamber Snake (Python)
|ATK: 160.650, DEF: 107.100, HP: 4.301.623, AFFCT: 157.050?<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Two-headed Serpent|orange}} Fragment +40
|-
|rowspan="2"|36
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Magic Puppet
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Wings, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 1d 16h; requirement: 70x T6 minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Hellenic Treasure Map, +1000}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +2, <br>{{RewardIconWithText|Holy Wood Core}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|37
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Dean of Vyperin
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T3 Minerva Core, +8|blue}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Dean of Vyperin
|ATK:141.750, DEF:94.500, HP: 3.743.854, AFFCT 139250?<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +10|orange}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|-
|38
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Magic Guard
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Power, +10|purple}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|39
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Fire Element Essence
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Wings, +10|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Fire Magic Coffer
|Requires ART: 28k
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mischief Map|purple}} Fragment +20
|-
|rowspan="2"|40
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Wind Element Essence
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Core, +10|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Wind Magic Coffer
|Requires FAME: 29k
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mischief Map|purple}} Fragment +20
|-
|rowspan="2"|41
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Earth Element Essence
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Power, +10|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Earth Magic Coffer
|Requires CIV: 30k
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mischief Map|purple}} Fragment +20
|-
|rowspan="2"|42
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Water Element Essence
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Wings, +10|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Water Magic Coffer
|Requires FTHT: 31k
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Mischief Map|purple}} Fragment +20
|-
|rowspan="2"|43
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Magic Puppet
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Core, +10|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|Mine Pit
|Mining duration: 1d 16h; requirement: 70x T6 minions
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Hellenic Treasure Map, +1000}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithText|Holy Wood Core, +12}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb, +1|orange}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|44
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Warden
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Power}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Power, +12|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Magician Prison
|Complete 10 challenges
|Total:<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Demon Chest, +300}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Master Alchemy Case, +3|orange}}, <br> {{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|45
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Necromancer
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Wings}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Wings, +12|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Wall of the Dead
|Display T7 Minion: Sanctum Warrior x5 (Athena's minion)
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear RF, +10}}, <br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Star Stone, +10}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|46
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Mahayana Practitioner
|
|{{RewardIcon|Minerva Core}} {{Retext|T4 Minerva Core, +12|purple}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Cultivation Casket
|Requires Relic Point: 3.5M
|{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|47
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Minerva
|
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +1k}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|Minerva
|ATK: 150.000, DEF: 100.000, HP: 26.000.000, AFFCT: 144.100<br>Special stats: CRIT +100%, Crit DMG -40%, HIT +80, Paralysis RES +80%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Arcane Moon}} +1
|-
|}

[[Category:Hellenic_Domain]]
